semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for the view command CLI functionality.
responsibilities: Sets up temporary test directories for isolated view command testing.
Mocks console output to capture and verify CLI command logging.
Validates experimental view layer configuration through Config.setExperimentalViewLayer.
Tests the executeViewCommand function's behavior under different configurations.
outOfScope: Testing other CLI commands (e.g., scan, init).
Implementing the view command logic (that's in the CLI module).
invariants: Uses Vitest testing framework with describe/it/beforeEach/afterEach structure.
Isolates test state using temporary directories created in os.tmpdir.
Mocks console.log to assert command output.
Depends on Config infrastructure for experimental feature toggles.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure CLI view command behaves correctly under config changes and logs appropriately.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of refactoring to modularize CLI and decouple core infra services, likely updating tests to match new modular structure.

English.role: Vitest unit test suite for the view command CLI functionality.
responsibilities: Sets up temporary test directories for isolated view command testing.
Mocks console output to capture and verify CLI command logging.
Validates experimental view layer configuration through Config.setExperimentalViewLayer.
Tests the executeViewCommand function's behavior under different configurations.
outOfScope: Testing other CLI commands such as scan or init.
Implementing the view command logic itself.
